generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that reducing our alliance commitments actually makes us safer? By focusing on our own defenses and letting others handle their own security, we can avoid being dragged into unnecessary conflicts. Our military budget is stretched thin as it is - why should we bear the burden for nations that won't invest in their own protection? #StrongerAlone #SmartDefense
